name: Mrs. Fields Icing
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chocolate and butter in a small saucepan. Place over low heat until melted.
2. Remove from heat. Combine the powdered sugar, whipped cream, and vanilla in a medium bowl.
3. Stir until smooth. Add the melted chocolate and butter. Set the bowl in a pan of ice and beat with a wooden spoon until thickened.
4. Frost the bottom layer, adding 1 cup of milk chocolate chips. Spread evenly over the top of the cake.
5. Add the second layer and frost it.
6. Apply Hershey kisses as desired over the top of the cake.
7. Add remaining milk chocolate chips to the sides.
